name: l2_powered_source_coupling_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceCouplingReadinessGate gates final runtime powered-source coupling on API physical-contract readiness acceptance-budget evidence plus actuator-disk policy readiness while preserving upstream acceptance-budget blocker provenance.
note: Primary final runtime coupling gate.

name: l2_powered_source_acceptance_budget_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceAcceptanceBudgetGate requires hover and cruise handoffs plus validation error budgets before acceptance evidence is ready and supplies dominant handoff and validation-budget blockers.
note: Acceptance-budget readiness and blocker-provenance input.

name: l2_powered_source_acceptance_handoff
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceAcceptanceHandoff supplies hover and cruise handoff readiness and blocker provenance behind the budget gate.
note: Handoff evidence input.

name: l2_powered_source_validation_error_budget
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceValidationErrorBudget supplies hover and cruise validation-budget candidate readiness and blocker provenance behind the budget gate.
note: Validation-budget evidence input.

name: l2_actuator_disk_representation_policy
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskRepresentationPolicy supplies rotor-disk mask and powered-source API policy readiness.
note: Representation policy input.

name: l2_powered_source_api_surface_audit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceApiSurfaceAudit supplies the public A4MC L2 powered-source API surface and physical-contract readiness required by final runtime coupling.
note: Global upstream API-surface input for the final coupling gate.

name: l2_rotor_disk_aperture
value: Aerodynamics4McL2RotorDiskAperture supplies the rotor aperture geometry used by ready actuator-disk policies.
note: Ready policy geometry input.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered-source API support.
note: Upstream powered-source CFD target.
